data.title: Rollins, Inc. will present at Barclays 43rd Annual conference, includes Kenneth Krause, EVP & CFO.
data.description: Atlanta, February 16, 2026 - Rollins, Inc. disclosed today that Kenneth Krause, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will be presenting at the Barclays 43rd Annual event. Rollins, Inc., listed on the NYSE as ROL, is a leading worldwide provider of consumer and commercial services. This event marks another step for the Company in engaging with investors and industry peers.

data.title: Educate 360 integrates Microsoft Copilot training into Microsoft Office courses to boost AI adoption. Correction made.
data.description: New Horizons has integrated Microsoft Copilot training into Microsoft Office courses in order to expedite the adoption of workplace AI. The announcement was made on 16-Feb-2026 by Educate 360 through PR Newswire. This collaboration aims to enhance productivity and efficiency in utilizing AI technologies at work. The comprehensive training program will equip professionals with the skills needed to leverage AI capabilities within Microsoft Office. This initiative signifies a strategic move to promote AI integration in workplaces.

data.title: Whirlpool Corp declares $0.90 per share dividend, payable on March 26, 2026, to stockholders of record.
data.description: In Benton Harbor, Michigan on February 16, 2026, the board of directors of Whirlpool Corporation announced a quarterly dividend of $0.90 per share on the Company's common stock. This dividend will be paid out on March 26, 2026, to stockholders who are recorded as such at the end of a specified date.

data.title: GlobalFoundries and Renesas have announced a multi-billion-dollar partnership to boost U.S. semiconductor manufacturing, catering to the rising demand for chips in smart vehicles and next-gen industrial systems.
data.description: A massive collaboration worth billions of dollars has been formed to enhance supply chain resilience and cater to the increasing demand for chips used in smart vehicles and cutting-edge industrial systems. This partnership aims to ensure smooth operations and meet the rising market need for these advanced technologies.

data.title: Aeroméxico reports unaudited 4Q25 & FY25 results in millions of USD, subject to revision upon completion of financial closing process.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: AERO & BMV: AERO) disclosed unaudited consolidated financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025. The information covers the three months ending December 31, 2025 (4Q25) and the twelve months ending December 31, 2025 (FY25). The figures are based on data available as of the release date and are subject to potential revisions following the completion of the annual financial closing process. The financial results are presented in millions of U.S. dollars as the Company's functional currency. These results do not represent a comprehensive financial statement for the period and may be altered as further developments arise before the finalization of the financial closing process.

data.title: PwC Hong Kong and watchTowr expand partnership for preemptive resilience in MSS, major clients since early 2024.
data.description: In Hong Kong, PwC Hong Kong (PwC) and watchTowr have revealed the expansion of their collaboration. PwC will extend providing the watchTowr Platform in its Managed Security Service (MSS) solution to aid organizations in consistently verifying genuine exposure and responding quicker than malicious parties. The partnership, initiated in early 2024, has catered to substantial clients within critical infrastructure, corporate, and higher education sectors.

data.title: Otter Tail Corp reports $6.55 EPS in 2025, 16% ROE, and guides $5.22-$5.62 EPS for 2026 with 12% ROE projection. CEO pleased.
data.description: Fergus Falls, Minnesota - Otter Tail Corporation (Nasdaq: OTTR) released their financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company reported an annual diluted earnings per share of $6.55 and reached a consolidated return on equity of 16% with an equity ratio of 63%. Their projected diluted earnings per share for 2026 fall within the range of $5.22 to $5.62, anticipating a return on equity of 12% at the midpoint. The CEO expressed contentment with the 2025 financial performance, highlighting the company's achievements in the annual results.
FEDERAL COURT OF AUSTRALIA: DISMISSES ACTIVIST SHAREHOLDER CASE AGAINST SANTOS' CLEAN ENERGY CLAIMS

data.title: Atopic dermatitis market to surge by 2034 with new therapies like Rocatinlimab and Amlitelimab, led by biologics & JAK inhibitors.
data.description: The market for atopic dermatitis is projected to see significant growth due to the widespread adoption of approved treatments for moderate-to-severe cases and the introduction of new therapies like OX40 inhibitor (Rocatinlimab [KHK4083/AMG451]) and OX40L inhibitor (Amlitelimab [KY1005]). This growth is driven by the increasing market penetration of these therapies and the expanding treatment options available. The market is expected to experience a surge in activity with the entry of these new treatments, leading to a more competitive landscape and offering patients more choices for managing their condition.

data.title: FIBRA Prologis in Mexico declares a cash distribution of Ps. 1,262.1 million (US$73.2 million) for shareholders.
data.description: In Mexico City on February 16, 2026, FIBRA Prologis, a prominent company in the Class-A industrial real estate sector in Mexico with the stock code BMV:FIBRAPL 14, announced a cash distribution totaling Ps. 1,262.1 million (equivalent to US$73.2 million). This distribution amounts to Ps. 0.7566 per Certificado Bursátil Fiduciario Inmobiliario held by investors.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals surpasses 2025 production guidance with approx. 692,000 GEOs and projects 50% growth to 1.2M GEOs by 2030.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 16, 2026, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. announced their 2025 actual production numbers. The company reported a total production of around 692,000 gold equivalent ounces ("GEOs"), surpassing the top end of their 2025 production guidance range of 670,000 GEOs.
